what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment record for the design-assets channel; it declares an image attachment of type images that points to the image URI image://design-assets/icons/Feature_5_Drone and records an id and an added timestamp.
observations: The entire content is YAML frontmatter with no body text.
There are no code symbols present.
standouts: It references a specific design asset, a drone feature icon, via a custom image:// URI.
It is typed as an images attachment inside the design-assets channel.
It is a timestamped, ID-addressed ledger entry with no additional description.
notes: A timestamped design-assets attachment metadata card that points to the Feature 5 Drone icon image.
questions: What image format and dimensions does the referenced icon have?
What product or feature does Feature 5 Drone represent?
Does the image://design-assets/icons/Feature_5_Drone URI resolve to an actual file?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose as an image attachment record matches the content: it records an image target, attachment type, channel, and timestamp.
intention_signals: It seems to be trying to catalog and link a specific design asset (a drone feature icon) into a channel memory ledger so it can be referenced by a stable ID and timestamp.
contribution: Provides a stable, timestamped pointer to a design asset within a channel, supporting asset tracking and retrieval by URI.
summary_for_embedding: Attachment metadata record att-8af1bdd3 in the design-assets channel linking to image://design-assets/icons/Feature_5_Drone with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To register and track a drone feature icon image asset in the design-assets channel memory.
